Intapp Ireland Limited

Block A, George's Quay Plaza

George's Quay

Dublin 2, Ireland

Payment by Wire Transfer:
Name of Beneficiary: INTAPP IRELAND LIMITED Name of Bank: Bank of America Account Number: 61236018 IBAN: IE10 BOFA 9900 6161 2360 18 BIC: BOFAIE3X Payments in EUR can be processed via wire or ACH. Payments in currencies other than EUR must be submitted via wire transfer.
